'''Eckla Shoolb''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] and member of [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa's]] [[Jeedai heresy]]. She was [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] and beaten, but did not break under [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra's]] interrogation. She was then sentenced to [[Death/Legends|death]]. Guards broke her legs, and she was thrown into the [[yargh'un]] pit to die of thirst and starvation.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
